summary_en: 220,000 shares (1.88% S/O) up to ¥300M. Acquisition window extended from 2026-05-31 to 2026-06-30. Open-market purchases on TSE. As of 2026-04-30: 55,900 shares acquired for ¥87.9M. Original cap not expected to be reached within initial period.
title_en: Notice regarding extension of period for acquisition of treasury shares
translation_en_brief: On 21 May 2026, Solvvy Inc. announced an extension of its treasury share acquisition period. The board resolved on 13 February 2026 to acquire up to 220,000 common shares (1.88% of shares outstanding, excluding treasury stock) for a maximum aggregate price of ¥300 million via open-market purchases on the Tokyo Stock Exchange. The original acquisition window was 16 February to 31 May 2026. Because neither the share count nor aggregate price ceiling was expected to be reached within that initial period, the board has extended the acquisition window to 30 June 2026. As of 30 April 2026, the company had cumulatively acquired 55,900 shares for ¥87.86 million.
